base.redeployNote: P4.1 + P4.2 BROADCAST (2026-07-06). P4.1: PrivacyPool rewritten to per-denom Poseidon trees + global spent set; constructor (address verifier, uint256[] initialDenominations). Single-denom back-compat achieved by seeding [100000000000000000] (0.1 ETH) - pool owner may call addDenomination(d) post-deploy to enable other face values. P4.2: NEW AerodromePrivacyWrapper deployed via one-off script/DeployAerodrome.s.sol (broadcast-only-no-redeploy-all) for Base's primary DEX. The prior P3.4 single-denom pool at 0x3A7DA29bfd9853A0449c8c51F7007B7f5126C455 remains on-chain but is no longer the canonical pool. costs: P4.1 ~0.000033 ETH (5 contracts); P4.2 ~0.000004 ETH (1 contract). Forge vm.writeJson quirk persists only chainId; this manifest was hand-enriched post-broadcast from contracts/broadcast/{Deploy,DeployAerodrome}.s.sol/8453/run-latest.json.
